channel.title: Troika Games on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Troika Games on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Why Troika Games Were So Buggy
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why Troika games were so buggy.

item.title: Troika's Conan The Barbarian Proposal
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about another game proposal I made.

item.title: The Origin Of Troika's Name
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the origin of the name for troa games.

item.title: Troika And Kickstarter: What If?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troa games and Kickstarter.

item.title: Late-Stage Troika
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about late stage troa, because I’ve told a lot of troa stories already and you can look them up.

item.title: Troika's Flat Hierarchy Experiment
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about flat management hierarchies.

item.title: Why I Won't Run Another Business
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer another question, this time from user Delta pi 8859, who asks a large number of questions, luckily about one topic.

item.title: Troika Memories
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to reminisce about Troika.

item.title: Troika's Baldur's Gate 3 Proposal
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troika’s botters Gate 3 proposal.

item.title: Proposed Expansions to Vampire Bloodlines
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about two potential expansions — or you could say it’s SQL — that Troika had designed for Vampire: The Masquerade — Bloodlines.

item.title: Troika's Might & Magic 10 Design
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troika’s proposal from might Magic 10..

item.title: Troika Games' Lord of the Rings Demo (2001)
Arcanum 2: Journey to the Center of Arcanum
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the sequel to Arcanum called Journey to the Center of Arcanum.
